::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">4</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/acsmaterialslett.4c02086" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Increasing the Energy Density of Disordered Rock Salt Anodes for Fast-Charging Lithium-Ion Batteries</span>

H. Lin, W.-T. Peng, Z. Wang, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, S. M. Vornholt, H. Liu, S. Wang, J. Holoubek, K. Zhou, Q. Miao, S. Huber, K. W. Chapman, S. P. Ong, and P. Liu

*ACS Materials Lett.* **2025**, *7*, 699–706. DOI: 10.1021/acsmaterialslett.4c02086
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](01_2025_RS1/RS1_TOC.jpeg)
:::

:::
